name: nkia-codex-skills
description: Codex skills for NKIA feature/task workflows, PR/MR validation, and weekly reporting.

interface.shortDescription: NKIA Linear workflow and weekly report skills
interface.longDescription: Codex skills for NKIA-AI feature/task planning, task start, PR/MR shipping with Korean code validation, evidence validation, parent feature roll-up, and weekly work reporting.
defaultPrompt: Use $feature to define a parent Linear feature.
Use $task to create child implementation tasks.
Use $weekly to prepare the weekly report.
